name: Air Restaurant

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against the current restaurant-issued menu captured on 2026-07-14.
The live page contains 34 structured food formulations plus six additional prefix-menu formulations embedded in menu prose, for 40 distinct formulations and 45 presentations across 11 categories.
Five frozen rows are adjacent descriptions or sauces promoted to products, Mimosa Carafe is alcohol, and Hand Cut Truffle Fries is absent from the current page.
Bottle-service products and alcohol were excluded; same-name food rows were consolidated only when the current formulation matched.
Air publishes selected fixed item descriptions but no complete allergen matrix, complete recipes, or cross-contact policy.
Eighteen current formulations have positive signals supported by fixed text or unavoidable named formats; 22 remain unavailable rather than inferred.
Ten applicable frozen rows mismatch: nine underreported and Bowtie Pasta overreported because optional shrimp and salmon add-ons were treated as fixed ingredients.
The page-wide raw or undercooked-food warning is not assigned to individual products.

The frozen generic sequential parser promoted descriptions and serving instructions, shifted categories, missed current structured and prefix-menu products, and attached adjacent allergens to unrelated rows.
The correction uses the page's data-aid title, description, and section relationships for structured menus and separately reviewed prefix-menu prose for its real choices.
Optional add-on clauses are removed before interpreting Bowtie Pasta's fixed ingredient text, and repeated names remain separate when descriptions or serving context differ.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Confirmed the Air Restaurant identity and current menu navigation.
Captured and reviewed all current structured food cards, prefix menus, late-night food, and party platters.
Captured current brunch policies; the page does not publish an additional item-level brunch catalog.
The frozen source route now redirects to the bottle-service menu and contributes no current food formulations.
Found selected descriptions and a general raw-food warning but no complete allergen matrix, recipes, or cross-contact policy.

findings.summary: The frozen 30-row catalog promoted descriptions and sauces, shifted categories, omitted current products, retained alcohol, and lost current menu-surface context.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 40 current food formulations and 45 presentations across 11 restaurant-issued categories and removed all structural, alcohol, and stale rows.

findings.summary: Ten applicable frozen rows disagree with current fixed published signals, including a burger assigned egg and shellfish from adjacent content and Bowtie Pasta assigned optional proteins.
findings.resolution: Recomputed positive signals from fixed descriptions and unavoidable formats, excluded optional add-ons and page-wide warnings, and retained 22 current rows as unavailable.

findings.summary: The frozen extraction flattened happy-hour, prefix, dinner, late-night, and party-platter surfaces into generic Restaurant, Sides, and Entrees categories.
findings.resolution: Restored all 11 real source-and-section categories and retained distinct same-name formulations where current descriptions differ.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested a 40-formulation Air Restaurant catalog across 11 current categories with 18 positive rows, 22 unavailable rows, and no promoted-description, alcohol, bottle-service, or stale-product contamination.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=/tmp/air-restaurant-repository.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 40 items, 11 categories, 18 positive rows, 22 unavailable rows, and all known artifacts excluded)

notes: Current corrected catalog counts: 40 formulations, 45 presentations, 11 categories, 18 positive rows, and 22 unavailable rows.
